description_long: This object is a modern black laptop with a large, rectangular display and a full-sized keyboard. The screen is open and displays a dark wallpaper featuring a night sky with stars and a tent illuminated in the foreground. The laptop's chassis is sleek and angular, with a matte finish and minimal visible branding or ornamentation. The keyboard includes a touchpad centered below the spacebar, and the hinge mechanism is robust, supporting the screen at a comfortable viewing angle. Ports are visible along the sides, including what appears to be a USB port and an Ethernet port. The overall design is utilitarian and professional, suitable for use in urban environments such as cafes, offices, or public spaces.
description: A sleek, black laptop with a large screen displaying a night sky wallpaper, full keyboard, and visible side ports. The design is modern and professional with a matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen with a night sky wallpaper, full keyboard, and touchpad.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the laptop's slim profile and visible side ports.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the closed back of the screen with no visible branding or features.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the laptop's profile and additional side ports.
attribute_screen_state: Screen is open and on, displaying a night sky wallpaper with a tent.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with function row and standard keys; numeric keypad not visible.
